---
title: "Now"
subtitle: "What I'm working on"
description-meta: "Current projects and research activities of Andrés André Camargo Bertel"
title-block-banner: false
---

A few things keeping me busy these days:

## Research & Modeling

::: {.callout-tip}
## Big-picture question
How can Colombia and Latin America build cost-effective, low-carbon energy systems—and how can energy modeling inform the policies that get us there?
:::

- Building energy-system models and electricity-demand profiles for Colombia as an Energy Modeler at the National Mining and Energy Planning Unit (UPME), contributing to the **National Energy Plan (2025–2055)** as the transport-sector modeler.
- Working on a **technical, economic, and environmental assessment of green ammonia production in Colombia**, toward a national roadmap.
- Continuing research with the **UREMA Research Unit** at Universidad del Norte on transport electrification and industrial decarbonization across Latin America.

## Open to collaboration on

- Energy systems modeling (EnergyPLAN, OSeMOSYS)
- Renewable energy integration and power system planning
- Transport electrification and decarbonization
- Industrial decarbonization (steel, cement, hydrogen, ammonia)
- Energy modeling to support public policy

*Interested in collaborating? [Get in touch](contact.qmd).*
